items.headline: permission rules can now match tool parameters
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.178 ships `Tool(param:value)` syntax for permission rules — write `Agent(model:opus)` to block specific subagent models without banning subagents entirely. nested `.claude/` directory resolution also lands, where the closest config to the working directory takes precedence. both changes are directly relevant to the portfolio agent system: model-tier control for scout, scoped config for the Actions workflow.
